title: DONEPEZIL
description: Donepezil is an acetylcholinesterase inhibitor FDA-approved for Alzheimer's disease. By preventing acetylcholine breakdown, it enhances cholinergic transmission and cognitive function. Some use it off-label for cognitive enhancement.

research.title: Donepezil for dementia due to Alzheimer's disease
research.summary: Evaluates donepezil's modest benefits in cognitive function and daily living activities over 12-24 weeks, noting higher doses produce more adverse events.

research.title: Clinical efficacy and safety of donepezil in the treatment of Alzheimer's disease in Chinese patients
research.summary: Reviews donepezil effectiveness in Chinese populations, finding it generally safe with potential impacts on disease biomarkers.

research.title: Efficacy and safety of donepezil, galantamine, and rivastigmine for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease
research.summary: Systematic review comparing three cholinesterase inhibitors through comprehensive database searches to evaluate their therapeutic effectiveness.

research.title: Impact of Donepezil and Memantine on Behavioral and Psychological Symptoms of Alzheimer Disease
research.summary: Study of 85 moderate Alzheimer's patients found both medications significantly reduced behavioral symptoms, with good tolerability.

research.title: Donepezil in the treatment of ischemic stroke: Review and future perspective
research.summary: Explores donepezil's potential neuroprotective effects in ischemic stroke, noting preclinical promise but limited clinical evidence.

sentiment.summary: Mixed reports for cognitive enhancement in healthy individuals. More consistently beneficial for those with cognitive impairment. Side effects can be significant.

effects.label: Best for Impairment:
effects.description: Most effective for treating cognitive decline.

effects.label: Variable in Healthy:
effects.description: Benefits less consistent in cognitively healthy individuals.

effects.label: Long Half-Life:
effects.description: Reaches steady state after several weeks.

dosage.label: Once Daily:
dosage.description: Long half-life allows single daily dosing.

sideEffects.label: Cholinergic Effects:
sideEffects.description: Nausea, diarrhea, and muscle cramps common.

sideEffects.label: Bradycardia:
sideEffects.description: Can slow heart rate; caution with cardiac conditions.

availability.label: International Pharmacies:
availability.description: May be obtained from overseas sources.
